---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect in contracts, schemas, or validation behavior
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the defect clearly.

## Affected area

- Schema validity
- Contract compatibility
- CI validation
- Documentation

## Current behavior

What is happening now?

## Expected behavior

What should happen instead?

## Reproduction or evidence

Provide failing payloads, validation output, consumers affected, or screenshots.

## Impact

- [ ] Breaks validation workflows
- [ ] Breaks downstream SDK generation
- [ ] Breaks service compatibility
- [ ] Requires coordinated rollout across repositories

## Notes

Add impacted consumers, versions, or follow-up context here.
